EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITransform3D

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to methods for transforming 3D geometries using either specific parameters or arbitrary transformation objects.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("9414E949-FFA0-11D3-9F56-00C04F6BDF0D")]
public interface ITransform3D

Methods

Move3D(double, double, double)

Moves the object by dx, dy and dz along the x, y, and z axes respectively.

void Move3D(double dx, double dy, double dz)

Parameters

dx double
dy double
dz double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MoveVector3D(IVector3D) 

void MoveVector3D(IVector3D v)

Parameters

v IVector3D

ProjectToPlane(IPoint, IVector3D, IVector3D) 

IGeometry ProjectToPlane(IPoint planarOrigin, IVector3D planarPositiveX, IVector3D planarNorm)

Parameters

planarOrigin IPoint
planarPositiveX IVector3D
planarNorm IVector3D

Returns

IGeometry

RotateVector3D(IVector3D, double) 

void RotateVector3D(IVector3D axis, double rotationAngle)

Parameters

axis IVector3D
rotationAngle double

Scale3D(IPoint, double, double, double) 

void Scale3D(IPoint Origin, double sx, double sy, double sz)

Parameters

Origin IPoint
sx double
sy double
sz double

Transform3D(esriTransformDirection, ITransformation3D) 

void Transform3D(esriTransformDirection Direction, ITransformation3D Transformation)
